String: The action <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Umbral Soul<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> halts the expiration of <UIForeground>F201FA</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201FB</UIGlow>Umbral Ice<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>. Reapplying this effect, or casting a spell of the opposite, will cause its expiration to resume.
